Unsafe ⚠️

On this page

Games ​

Required Components

Install these three before downloading games (legitimate or pirated) to avoid crashes from missing software on your computer:

  • DirectX
  • VisualCppRedist AIO
  • XNA Framework

Repacks ​

What are repacks?

Repacks are compressed games for low-bandwidth users, but installing them takes time due to file decompression.

  • Dodi Repacks

  • FitGirl Repacks

  • ElAmigos

  • Kaoskrew

Direct Download Sites ​

Direct downloads are normal downloads from a server, being safer and not requiring a VPN. You may need a VPN to access blocked file hosts (like Rapidgator in some EU countries). I would recommend using AB Download Manager to speed up downloads.

  • CS.RIN.RU - Game piracy forum / Account required / Enhancement mod / Password: cs.rin.ru

  • SteamGG

  • SteamRIP - Steam games

  • AnkerGames

  • GameBounty

  • GogGames - GOG Games
